emits one ToolCall JSON per response

g.text: steps[] · tx hashes · gas spent · portfolio before/after
1. aave_withdraw — free liquidity if needed for swaps
2. velora_quote_swap → velora_execute_swap — one quote per swap, always
3. aave_supply — deploy residual USDT to earn yield
